summary: Enhanced Delivery Closure System (Dual-Mode Completion Engine) testing complete. All backend tests passed (17/17). All frontend UI components verified working. Both closure modes (signed and confirmed_without_signature) function correctly with proper validation and locking.

issues: Console shows 404 errors for some resources (likely favicon or static assets) - non-blocking

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test delivery notes during testing for closure workflow verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced Delivery Closure System fully verified. Dual-mode closure working: (1) Signed mode with signature pad captures receiver_name, receiver_designation, receiver_signature, (2) Confirmed mode captures receiver_name, completion_note, authorization_source. Both modes set closure_locked=true and appropriate status (completed_signed or completed_confirmed). Locked notes correctly block further modifications with 400 error. Backward compatibility with status=delivered maintained.

details: POST /api/admin/delivery-notes/{id}/close with closure_method=signed requires receiver_name and receiver_signature
Sets status=completed_signed and closure_locked=true
Stores receiver_designation, completed_at timestamp
Returns 400 if signature missing
Returns 400 if receiver_name missing or empty
POST /api/admin/delivery-notes/{id}/close with closure_method=confirmed_without_signature requires receiver_name and completion_note
Sets status=completed_confirmed and closure_locked=true
Stores authorization_source (in_person, phone, whatsapp, email)
Returns 400 if completion_note missing
Returns 400 if receiver_name missing or empty
PATCH /api/admin/delivery-notes/{id}/status returns 400 on locked notes
POST /api/admin/delivery-notes/{id}/close returns 400 on already closed notes
Error message mentions 'locked' or 'closed'
PATCH /api/admin/delivery-notes/{id}/status with status=delivered redirects to close logic
Accepts closure fields (closure_method, receiver_name, receiver_signature) via PATCH endpoint
issued → in_transit works
issued → pending_confirmation works
in_transit → pending_confirmation works
Any status → cancelled works (before closure)
Dual-mode selection buttons present (Sign with Receiver / Confirm by Staff)
Signed mode shows signature pad with Clear and Accept Signature buttons
Confirmed mode shows authorization source dropdown and completion note textarea
Confirmation checkbox required for confirmed mode
Complete & Lock button submits closure
Completion Summary Card appears after closure
Shows receiver name, designation, completed_at timestamp
Shows closure method (Signed or Confirmed Without Signature)
Signed mode displays digital signature image
Confirmed mode displays completion note and authorization source
Locked badge appears on completed notes
Locked notice replaces Quick Actions for completed notes
issued: bg-blue-100 text-blue-700
in_transit: bg-amber-100 text-amber-700
pending_confirmation: bg-purple-100 text-purple-700
completed_signed: bg-green-100 text-green-700
completed_confirmed: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700
cancelled: bg-red-100 text-red-700
Total, Issued, In Transit, Completed, Cancelled stat cards present
Completed count includes both completed_signed and completed_confirmed statuses
